title: Add X-Registry-Config support
body:
* Refactor auth pkg to support X-Registry-Config
* Refactor bindings to support X-Registry-Config
* Refactor build endpoint to support X-Registry-Config. Supports:
  * --creds
  * --authfile
* Added X-Reference-Id Header to http.Request to support log event
  correlation
* Log headers from http.Request

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

@jwhonce, did you check how Atomic Docker deals with the auth header for build?

We may need a fallback on the server side and check for both headers to be compatible with vanilla Docker (Config) and Atomic (potentially multi-auth Auth).
@jwhonce Is this still a WIP PR?
